TABLE.NAME: webservice_mcp_credential
TABLE.COMMENT: Plugin-managed connector credentials for Moodle MCP bootstrap and remote access.

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: The Moodle user this connector credential belongs to.

FIELD.NAME: token
FIELD.COMMENT: Opaque connector credential token.

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Human-readable label for operator inspection.

FIELD.NAME: serviceidentifier
FIELD.COMMENT: Connector-managed service boundary identifier.

FIELD.NAME: contextid
FIELD.COMMENT: Restricted context anchor for connector credential use.

FIELD.NAME: tokentype
FIELD.COMMENT: 0=session-linked or short-lived bootstrap credential, 1=durable remote grant.

FIELD.NAME: sid
FIELD.COMMENT: Linked browser session identifier when bootstrap is session-bound.

FIELD.NAME: validuntil
FIELD.COMMENT: Credential expiry timestamp.

FIELD.NAME: iprestriction
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional IP restriction for credential use.

FIELD.NAME: scope
FIELD.COMMENT: Granted OAuth scopes when this credential originated from the OAuth server.

FIELD.NAME: resourceuri
FIELD.COMMENT: Canonical MCP resource URI this credential is bound to.

FIELD.NAME: oauthclientid
FIELD.COMMENT: OAuth client id that originated this credential, when applicable.

FIELD.NAME: lastaccess
FIELD.COMMENT: Last successful use timestamp.

FIELD.NAME: revoked
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether the connector credential has been revoked.

TABLE.NAME: webservice_mcp_audit
TABLE.COMMENT: Audit trail for connector discovery and tool execution.

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: Moodle user associated with the transport action.

FIELD.NAME: credentialid
FIELD.COMMENT: Connector credential used for the transport action, when present.

FIELD.NAME: contextid
FIELD.COMMENT: Restricted context for the request.

FIELD.NAME: serviceid
FIELD.COMMENT: Resolved external service id for the request.

FIELD.NAME: sessionid
FIELD.COMMENT: MCP transport session id.

FIELD.NAME: requestid
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON-RPC request id.

FIELD.NAME: action
FIELD.COMMENT: Audit action type such as discover or tool_call.

FIELD.NAME: toolname
FIELD.COMMENT: Tool name for tool-call events.

FIELD.NAME: mutating
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether the audited request mutates Moodle state.

FIELD.NAME: outcome
FIELD.COMMENT: Result outcome such as success or error.

FIELD.NAME: detailcode
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional restriction or error code.

FIELD.NAME: auditid
FIELD.COMMENT: Stable public audit identifier returned to clients.

TABLE.NAME: webservice_mcp_oauth_client
TABLE.COMMENT: Registered OAuth clients allowed to request MCP access.

FIELD.NAME: clientid
FIELD.COMMENT: Public OAuth client id.

FIELD.NAME: clientsecret
FIELD.COMMENT: Hashed client secret for confidential clients.

FIELD.NAME: clientname
FIELD.COMMENT: Display label shown during authorization.

FIELD.NAME: redirecturis
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON array of registered redirect URIs.

FIELD.NAME: scope
FIELD.COMMENT: Registered maximum scope set for the client.

FIELD.NAME: granttypes
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON array of supported grant types.

FIELD.NAME: responsetypes
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON array of supported response types.

FIELD.NAME: tokenauthmethod
FIELD.COMMENT: OAuth token endpoint auth method.

FIELD.NAME: isdynamic
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether the client came from dynamic client registration.

FIELD.NAME: revoked
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether the client has been revoked.

TABLE.NAME: webservice_mcp_oauth_code
TABLE.COMMENT: Short-lived OAuth authorization codes for the MCP OAuth server.

FIELD.NAME: expiresat
FIELD.COMMENT: Authorization-code expiry timestamp.

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: Resource owner user id.

FIELD.NAME: clientid
FIELD.COMMENT: OAuth client id bound to this code.

FIELD.NAME: code
FIELD.COMMENT: Opaque authorization code.

FIELD.NAME: redirecturi
FIELD.COMMENT: Redirect URI bound to the authorization code.

FIELD.NAME: scope
FIELD.COMMENT: Granted scope set.

FIELD.NAME: resourceuri
FIELD.COMMENT: Canonical MCP resource URI requested by the client.

FIELD.NAME: contextid
FIELD.COMMENT: Restricted context selected for the resulting connector tokens.

FIELD.NAME: serviceidentifier
FIELD.COMMENT: Connector service identifier that will back the resulting access token.

FIELD.NAME: codechallenge
FIELD.COMMENT: PKCE code challenge.

FIELD.NAME: codechallengemethod
FIELD.COMMENT: PKCE challenge method.

FIELD.NAME: used
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether the authorization code has been consumed.
